prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
Create a project management tool like Trello with boards, cards, team members, due dates, and notifications.
Build an e-commerce platform with product listings, shopping cart, checkout, order tracking, and admin dashboard.
Create a learning management system with courses, lessons, quizzes, student progress tracking, and instructor dashboard.
Build a helpdesk ticketing system with ticket creation, assignment, priority levels, SLA tracking, and reporting.
Create a hospital management system with patient records, appointments, doctor schedules, billing, and pharmacy.
Build a real estate platform with property listings, search filters, agent profiles, appointment booking, and mortgage calculator.
Create a restaurant management system with menu management, table reservations, orders, kitchen display, and analytics.
Build a social media scheduling tool with post creation, multi-platform publishing, analytics, and team collaboration.
Create an HR management system with employee profiles, leave management, payroll, performance reviews, and org chart.
Build me an app.
I need something for my business to manage stuff.
Make a website with login.
Build an app like Uber but different.
I want a dashboard.
Build a completely free app with no login required but also make sure all data is private and secure per user with premium payments.
Create a real-time chat app that works offline and syncs instantly across all devices simultaneously without any server.
Build an app where admins have no special permissions but can also delete any user and access all private data.
Build a booking system with payments.
Create an inventory app with reports and user roles.
